lesson.menu_desc: Polite indirect questions in a session -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 6 -- Asking Questions in Sessions (Q&A) -- Polite Indirect Questions
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Marcos Mansour | Aula 6 -- Asking Questions in Sessions (Q&A)

listenings.text: Thank you. We now have time for questions. Before we begin, let me explain how this works. If you have a question, please raise your hand and wait for the microphone, so everyone in the audience can hear you. When it is your turn, please ask briefly, so we have time for as many questions as possible. A short, clear question is always the best. If you have a longer point or a detailed concern, that is perfectly fine, but please save it for after the session, when you can find the speaker directly. And remember, there are no bad questions today. So, who would like to go first?
